task: use the stick to drag the cube onto the green target
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A green cube, a purple cube, a pink cube, a gray cube, a blue cylinder, and a long stick lie on a brown surface. The green cube is the target. The stick is a tool for manipulation. STRATEGY - First, grasp the stick. Then, use the stick to push the green cube onto the purple target. Failure modes include not grasping the stick, misaligning the push, or the cube slipping. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the stick; Step 2 grasp the stick; Step 3 push the green cube with the stick; Step 4 release the stick.
Goal: on(green_cube, purple_cube)
Scene: green_cube, purple_cube, pink_cube, gray_cube, blue_cylinder, stick
Step 1: reach(stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the stick
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, stick, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, stick) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the stick
  contact: holding(stick) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(stick)
Step 3: push(green_cube -> purple_cube)
  affordance_region: the body of the green cube
  contact: touching(green_cube, stick) [progress]; touching(green_cube, purple_cube) [completion]
  spatial: distance(green_cube, purple_cube, <, 0.05) [progress]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  safety: no_slip(green_cube)
  done_when: touching(green_cube, purple_cube)
Step 4: release(stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the stick
  contact: released(stick) [completion]
  done_when: released(stick)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green cube
